query:
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, howHeard, referredById, 
       JSON_EXTRACT(applicationData, '$.heardAbout') as heardAbout
FROM recruitment_prospects 
WHERE applicationData IS NOT NULL
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(applicationData, '$.heardAbout') LIKE '%iktok%'
LIMIT 10;
command:
